description: Correct-but-unoptimized PolyBench-style fixed-size NxN integer GEMM (C = beta*C + alpha*(A*B), N=16). Optimization-loop demo: csim already PASSES; the inner dot-product k-loop runs sequentially, leaving real PPA headroom. Pipelining the inner loop (#pragma HLS PIPELINE II=1) and cyclically partitioning B parallelizes the multiply-accumulate -> large latency drop without changing results. Demonstrator for the auto-derive throughput-target probe: NO throughput_target is hand-set.
expected: csim_pass=true; optimize lowers latency while keeping csim_pass=true
